ideation: This animation sequence depicts Ophiuchus, the serpent bearer, by having the robot mimic the act of holding a snake.  The movement will focus on the arms creating a cradle, emphasizing the act of carefully holding something.  The sequence will start with arms out to the side, then move to create the cradle, and end with a slight shift in balance as if the snake is slightly heavy. The robot's lack of hands will be simulated by having the wrists slightly angled, implying a gentle grasp.  The left arm will do most of the work.

frames.beat: arms spread wide, ready to receive
arms cradle the unseen serpent gently
shifting weight as the snake settles in the arms
